title: exomicrum coriaceum
intro: Exomicrum coriaceum is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. It is often referred to as the thick-leaved euphorb, characterized by its thick, fleshy leaves and small, white flowers. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as wounds and skin infections. Exomicrum coriaceum can be prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of a paste or ointment, which can be applied topically to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
